Premed.Note: Hydrocortison 100mg i.v., Dithiaden 1amp i.v., Pantoprazol 40mg p.o., Granisetron 2mg p.o.

Instructions.Name: rituximab
Instructions.Inst: v 500ml FR iv/ 1.infuzia: zacat 50ml/h, stupnovite zvysovat; dalsie cykly: 100ml/h

Instructions.Name: prednison
Instructions.Inst: 100 mg p.o. rozdeliť na 2-3 dávky denne

_source: Marcus R et al. Blood 2005;105:1417; BCCA LYRCVP
